title: ICE Announces Arrests of Criminal Aliens Including Murderers and Pedophiles
detail: ICE released a DHS press statement announcing arrests of individuals described as murderers, pedophiles, rapists, and other violent criminals. Among specific cases highlighted, ICE arrested a convicted domestic abuser in Nashville whose daughter feared he would kill her mother. The announcement continued a pattern of DHS press releases framing enforcement as targeting the 'worst of the worst.'

title: South Burlington Vermont ICE Raid Fallout: One Detainee Released, Two Remain in Custody
detail: One week after the March 11 ICE raid on a South Burlington, Vermont home on Dorset Street, one of the three detained immigrants was released while two remained in custody. The raid — which began with a car chase through a school corridor involving a vehicle ICE agents mistakenly believed belonged to their target — had triggered large street protests and clashes between demonstrators and law enforcement. Federal judges were reviewing the cases of Johana and Camila Patin Patin and Christian Jerez Andrade, none of whom were named on the criminal warrant authorizing entry.

media.caption: South Burlington Vermont ICE raid fallout continues
